programme.title: Luck
programme.desc: Musa, an underworld kingpin and a firm believer in luck, designs a series of life threatening adventure sports with hefty prize money for people around the world. However, the participants can only survive and win if they are exceptionally lucky.

programme.title: Black Friday
programme.desc: After the 1993 Mumbai bomb blasts rip the city apart, the police force launches a massive drive to catch the perpetrators. Their relentless pressure finally results in some names coming forward.

programme.title: Masti
programme.desc: Three henpecked friends tired of their respective marriage decide to spice up their lives by indulging in an extramarital affair. But things go downhill very quickly when they become the prime suspects in a deadly murder case.

programme.title: Golmaal
programme.desc: Ramprasad works for Bhavani, who discourages his employees from pursuing any hobbies. Things take a hilarious turn when Bhavani catches Ramprasad at a hockey match and he lies about having a twin.

programme.title: Adalat
programme.desc: Village bred farmer, brave, and honest, Dharamchand alias Dharma is thrilled when his wife, Radha, gives birth to a baby boy, who they decide to call Raju. Dharma comes to the rescue of Ajit, Suresh, and Sujit, when they are being attacked by a tiger, and they graciously offer him a job in Bombay whenever he needs it. When the region experiences drought, Dharma, Radha, Raju and Dharma's sister, Laxmi, re-locate to Bombay, where Ajit makes Dharma the Manager of his warehouse.

programme.title: Hameshaa
programme.desc: Childhood friends Yash and Raja fall in love with Rani but their jealousy leads to the death of both Raja and Rani. When Yash comes across her lookalike, his obsession leads him down a dark path.

programme.title: Shoorveer
programme.desc: Siddharth is separated from his family as a child and he grows up hating his father. While his father tries to locate him, he ends up falling in love with Sitara and tries to win her heart.

programme.title: Badle Ki Raat
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Khel Power Ka
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Khakee
programme.desc: DCP Anant and his team are assigned to escort an alleged terrorist from Chandangarh to Mumbai. His seemingly simple mission turns into a deadly encounter of survival when a rogue ex-cop turned criminal hinders his way.

programme.title: Bajate Raho
programme.desc: The Movie Club+2

programme.title: C_Kkompany_FUM_Stereo_HIN_HD
programme.desc: A comedy film about three friends who start a fictitious company called C Kkompany to extort money from the corrupt people in their neighborhood. However, their plan backfires when the news of their company spreads like wildfire, and they become the talk of the town. The movie showcases the hilarious consequences of their actions and how they try to redeem themselves in front of the public.

programme.title: Hello_Hum_Lallan_Bol_Rahe_Hain_FUM_Stereo_HIN_HD
programme.desc: Lallan, a security guard, loves Saroja, who is supposed to get married to an older man for money. However, while convincing her to change her mind, he finds out another shocking fact about her.

programme.title: The Train
programme.desc: CBI inspector Shyam Kumar investigates a fake cheque scam, uncovering a web of deceit where no one is who they seem.

programme.title: Haan Maine Bhi Pyaar Kiya
programme.desc: Betrayed Pooja leaves Shiv, falls for Raj, but meeting Shiv again rekindles old love.

programme.title: Roja
programme.desc: Roja is a 1992 Indian romantic thriller by Mani Ratnam, starring Arvind Swamy and Madhoo.

programme.title: Maverick: Manhunt Brazil
programme.desc: Mysterious mercenary Jack Maverick (Emiliano Ruschel) arrives in the small town of Passo Fundo, Brazil, after accepting a lucrative contract to investigate a series of suicides. As Jack mingles with the locals, his investigation takes him to a bar, where singer Natasha (Carla Elgert), pill popper Olivia (Larissa Vereza) and drug dealer Zonta (Marcio Kieling) might prove to be the key to unraveling the mystery. During his investigation, Jack realizes that the suicides have a dangerous new drug in common, and finds out that an international drug dealing cartel has been pulling the strings all along.

programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: A black & white, film noir fashioned as a 40's gangster movie adaption from the classic Shakespearean stage-play 'Julius Caesar'.

programme.title: Black Cobra
programme.desc: A lone cop struggles to protect a female photographer from a gang of psychopathic bikers.

programme.title: Coldwater
programme.desc: Tragic events send a teenage boy to a juvenile reform facility in the wilderness run by a retired war colonel.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Lajja
programme.desc: The Film follows four women from different backgrounds in India as they unite to fight against misogyny and violence in their society. Forced marriage, domestic abuse, and honor killings are just some of the struggles they face. Through their determination, they discover the strength of the human spirit, inspiring others to join their fight for justice. With a powerful cast and storyline, sheds light on important social issues and the fight for women's rights. Will these women succeed in creating a better future for themselves and future generations?

programme.title: Gandhi My Father
programme.desc: The turbulent and troubled life of Gandhi's son, Harilal, who at once tried to support his father's ideology, while simultaneously trying to create a life for himself, separate from his family name.

programme.title: One Two Three
programme.desc: Three men named Laxmi Narayan—a wannabe hitman, a loyal aide to a powerful boss, and a women's lingerie salesman—travel on business to Pondicherry and unexpectedly check into the same hotel.

programme.title: Yodha No.1
programme.desc: Yodha No.1 (2003) Telugu action comedy: Kickboxer Chandu reunites with father, fights to win championship.

programme.title: Babbar The Police
programme.desc: ASP Abraham gets forced to arrest his brother on a false murder charge. Can he prove his brother's innocence?

programme.title: Terror Of Hallow'S Eve
programme.desc: After a fifteen-year-old is brutally beaten up by High School bullies, his wish for revenge unknowingly unleashes the Terror of Halloween.

programme.title: Pineville Heist
programme.desc: On a routine walk in the woods, a high schooler stumbles into the aftermath of a bank robbery gone wrong. He soon finds himself locked within the schoolgrounds, desperate to keep himself and his teacher alive as one of the psychotic thieves hunts them down.

programme.title: Prodigy
programme.desc: A mother concerned about her young son's disturbing behavior thinks something supernatural may be affecting him.

programme.title: The Landlord
programme.desc: Alyssa moves into a luxury apartment complex but is unaware she is being watched by her disturbed landlord, Robert, via hidden cameras. Robert will do anything to fill the void left by his estranged daughter--even if that means replacing her.

programme.title: SHAKE AND BAKE
programme.desc: John thinks his 1958 Corvette is ‘mostly original' but Dan finds a mismatched assortment of poor-quality parts and bad repairs. Chelsea wants FantomWorks to fix up a rare 1971 Fury for her father, Rikk. The car has previously caught on fire 3 times!

programme.title: FLYING HUMANOID, JERSEY DEVIL, BATSQUATCH
programme.desc: Across America, flying monsters like the Flying Humanoid, Batsquatch, and Jersey Devil terrorize communities, leaving towns gripped with fear.

programme.title: FANTOMWORKS GOES POSTAL
programme.desc: Ron and Valerie want Dan to restore their 1963 Jeep Willy's Fleetvan, but the problems run deeper than the seams hidden beneath inches of filler. Grady's Z28 breaks down so often that he's never had it out of second gear.

programme.title: SHAKE AND BAKE
programme.desc: John thinks his 1958 Corvette is ‘mostly original' but Dan finds a mismatched assortment of poor-quality parts and bad repairs. Chelsea wants FantomWorks to fix up a rare 1971 Fury for her father, Rikk. The car has previously caught on fire 3 times!

programme.title: THAT SINKING FEELING
programme.desc: Tom and Patti want to drive their 1967 Amphicar on land and water, but the hybrid boat-car has problems from stem to stern. Doc Pellerin hasn't started his ultra-rare Austin 10/4 in years. He needs Dan to get it running for a major car show in four days.

programme.title: ESCAPE FROM DEATH ROW
programme.desc: Mecklenburg Penitentiary's Death Row is considered 'escape proof'. The men housed there are serial murderers and rapists. But on a cold spring night in 1984, six of them got out....

programme.title: Anjali
programme.desc: A family is thrown into emotional turmoil when they discover their third child, Anjali—whom the mother was told had died at birth—is actually alive but suffering from a mental disability.

programme.title: Makkal En Pakkam
programme.desc: Childhood friends Samraj and Rajmohan become enemies after Samraj is falsely accused of theft. While Samraj, becomes a smuggler, he constantly faces problems due to Rajmohan's political influence.

programme.title: Priyamaanavaley
programme.desc: A modern man, Vijay, marries his father's sincere secretary who hails from a poor family. But their stringent prenuptial agreement grants him the power to end his marriage after 12 months.

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE are the beloved monkies of the Korean music industry - JANNABI! JANNABI is an old-fashioned Korean word for “monkey” and this band made their debut in 2014 with the digital single Rocket. Since then they have impressed numerous listeners with their retro-infused music that portrays various stories of the youth ranging from love to separation to frustration. Last year the band released their second full-length album Legend and topped all the music charts with the album's lead track for lovers who hesitate. Before releasing their third full-length album next year the band dropped a new mini-album just a week ago and this time as a duo to nourish listeners' hearts. In this episode JANNABI performs both their latest tracks and hit songs - A thought on an autumn night Old dog Sweet memories and Step from their new album JANNABI's Small Pieces 1 as well as Summer and for lovers who hesitate. Tune in to I'm LIVE this week and enjoy a beautiful autumn day with these talented musicians!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is a top-notch vocalist and songwriter Kim Bo-kyung (Neon)! This artist first made herself known to the public in 2010 through Superstar K2 and caused a real sensation with her rendition of Kelly Clarkson's Because of You. The following year she made her official debut with the first mini-album The First Day and then took part in the soundtracks of numerous TV series and films starting with School 2013. Recently Kim Bo-kyung (Neon) dropped the new digital single Why Am I? It's her first new song in 5 months with an intense guitar riff and band sound. 5 months back she released the song Let's Walk Through The Flower Path to offer a message of comfort to listeners as we are all going through the pandemic era. In this episode this musician performs That night That day (010)Unknown Call Let's Walk Through The Flower Path Love Yourself Why Am I? and Don't Think You're Alone. Tune in to I'm LIVE and enjoy Kim Bo-kyung (Neon)'s kaleidoscopic musicality!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter Meaningful Stone! Since releasing her debut single Camera in My Dreams in July 2017 she has garnered much attention with her self-produced music videos and live performance videos on YouTube. Naturally she became one of the most aspiring indie musicians in the Korean music scene who was also highly praised by renowned music critic and writer Bae Soon-tak. This past September Meaningful Stone released her first full-length album a call from my dreams which is named after the lead single off the album. As the title implies the song is about a call she received in her dreams when she was struggling with life's ups and downs. As opposed to reality she was continuously speaking words of love to herself while dreaming. She shares that hopeful message with listeners to offer a moment of comfort. In this episode Meaningful Stone performs a call from my dream nameless treasure hunt if I grow up as if and beep-boop-beep-boop. Tune in to I'm LIVE this week and check out her unpredictable yet genuine musicality!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter Car the Garden! This artist made his big debut in the music industry in 2013 under the name Mason the Soul. Then in 2017 he changed his stage name to Car the Garden a literal translation of his name Cha Jeong-won and pleasantly surprised everyone in indie circles with his unique voice and dream-like sounds. The following year he became the final winner of the fan-voting audition program The Fan and further secured his position in the industry. Last month Car the Garden released his much-anticipated new album Absence. Featuring 5 tracks the album is filled with his distinct warm sounds and also showcases his growth as a musician. In this episode Car the Garden performs Tree Sarah and Home Sweet Home as well asMy Whole World and Doesn't Matter from his latest album. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented artist!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is a singer with a heartrending voice... Yang Da Il! This artist garnered much attention even before his official debut by taking part in Jung Key's songs Be Forgotten and This Intense Moment in 2011 as a guest vocalist. 4 years later in 2015 Yang Da Il made his official debut with the single Think and engraved his name in the minds of the public with his iconic heartrending voice. In January this year Yang Da Il released his second full-length album our joys and sadnesses to depict love and breakups. His new songs dominated the top spots of music charts and proved once again how beloved he is as a musician. In this episode Yang Da Il performs Loss Darling Sometimes Hurt and Sorry. Tune in to I'm LIVE this week and enjoy his depiction of love and separation!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is R&B musician Babylon! This artist made his big debut in 2015 with the single PRAY and immediately captured listeners' hearts with his unusual soulful vibes. Then he engraved his names in the minds of the public by featuring in ZICO's Boys And Girls which led him to collaborate with a number of top artists in the industry including Verbal Zint The Quiett Nucksal BewhY Suzy Chungha Yubin and more. This February Babylon returned to the industry with his much-anticipated new album Hardy packed to the brim with collaborations and songs. One of the lead singles Alone was written composed and produced by Lee Hyo-ri and another lead single Like Song features top rapper Jay Park. Babylon also worked with Kid Milli Coogie KYLE LO Samuel Seo Lee Young-ji Queen WA$ABII and more for the album. In this episode Babylon performs Like Song Dawn Fog Chandelier Red Lipstick and White Suit to showcase the essence of his musicality. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented artist!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is the band MACGUFFIN! This band is composed of drummer SNOOQ vocalist and guitarist Byeon Ha-geum bassist UHI and guitarist Bae Joon-il. The band is named after a technique of the same name that advances a film's plot builds the narrative and helps push the story forward widely popularized by Alfred Hitchcock. Back in 2017 the quartet participated in the Arirang Competition and won the Grand Prize with their unique interpretation of Arirang. Then in 2018 they won the Golden Prize at the Penta Super Rookie and engraved their name in the minds of the public. The members recently completed their mandatory military duties and are so ready to impress listeners with their matured musicality. In this episode MACGUFFIN performs Sinpa Bucket List Highway and more to showcase their artistic prowess. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet these four talented musicians!

programme.title: Shrimaan Shrimati
programme.desc: Keshav lusts after glamorous Prema, while neighbour Dilruba eyes homely Kokila. Follows their misadventures in trying to get closer to each other's wives.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Baithki

programme.title: Kitabwala

programme.title: Tarikh

programme.title: Tarikh

programme.title: The Lallantop
programme.desc: In today's Lallantop show, Kuldeep discusses the NEET exam cancellation after a paper leak, the CBI investigation ordered by NTA, and the 22.79 lakh affected students. Watch to know which cities were part of the leak network and why transparency remains a big concern.

programme.title: Duniyadari
programme.desc: World eyes are on Donald Trump's historic China visit on May 13, the first by a US President in nine years, as both nations look to reset ties amid ongoing rivalry. Plus, UK PM Keir Starmer refuses to resign despite calls from his own party, and US holds talks with Denmark over Greenland military presence.

programme.title: Kharcha Paani

programme.title: Social List

programme.title: Sehat

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.3

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.4
programme.desc: Jo Gwan Woong visits the Hundred Year Inn. Tae Seo politely informs him there are no empty rooms, but Gwan Woong becomes enraged and causes a scene. Kang Chi, who had been kicked out by Lady Yoon, hears the news and, after some conflict, returns to confront Jo Gwan Woong.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.5
programme.desc: Kang Chi and Yeo Wool are attacked by dark shadows. Kang Chi, unfamiliar with such opponents, is cut multiple times while fighting back. Hearing Kang Chi is injured, Chung Jo visits him out of worry, and they share an affectionate hug. Yeo Wool witnesses their embrace.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.6
programme.desc: Enraged by Jo Gwan Woong's atrocities, Kang Chi's eyes turn red, and he lunges at him. Jo Gwan Woong frames Park Mu Sol for high treason and Kang Chi for murder.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.7
programme.desc: Yeo Wool is deeply shocked to see Kang Chi transform into a half-human, half-beast before her eyes and reports it to Dam Pyung Joon. Kang Chi, unable to accept his hidden beastly nature, is tormented.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.8
programme.desc: Jo Gwan Woong, having framed Kang Chi for murder, orders his execution. At that moment, Yi Sun Shin appears, demands Kang Chi's release, and declares the punishment unjust.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wildadventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that drawsvisitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife.

programme.title: Fury Spinner
programme.desc: After decades of development, Fury Spinner duel has become one of the most popular sports in the world. At this time, the "Ultimate Feast" Invitational Tournament of Fury Spinner began. The protagonist Meteo is invited to the mysterious island together with other top players in the world to embark on a survival adventure. During the adventure, Meteo not only relied on his determination to protect the weak and gained recognition to unlock the power of the sacred beast, but also got acquainted with the hidden master Kim who came here to find his brother and Joll who wanted to prove as the “perfect warrior” to his father. However, this "Ultimate Feast" tournament is just a conspiracy of the organizer Kenji! He wants to use the players to awaken the evil forces in the island to destroy the world! Meteo and friends stepped forward and tried their best to defeat Kenji.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan
programme.desc: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan is a culinary history show that explores the food of the royals and their erstwhile states. The show takes it's viewers through an amazing journey of anecdotes, folktales, architecture, art, history and landscape and delves into the unique customs and traditions of the various provinces. All these culminate into beautiful renditions of the recipes unique to those regions. This new season of Raja Rasoi aur Anya Kahaniyaan focuses on the royal families as protagonists and explores their personal stories and journeys that shaped their present day food practices.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: Epic Ke Dus
programme.desc: Epic Ke Dus is a halfhour collated list of the top ten people, places or events of a chosen topic, examples of which include rivalries, thinkers and warriors. Each topic has been thoroughly researched and a panel of experts on the subject has carefully selected the stories that are fitting to be part of the topic. This panel is seen on the episodes giving their views on the events, the significance of the event and describing the mood of the era, publics reaction to these events and how it contributed to change the course of Indian history.

programme.title: Arkeo (EN)
programme.sub-title: The Lost City Of The Tairona People
programme.desc: For nearly 400 years, in north-eastern Colombia, one of the largest pre-Columbian cities remained unnoticed, submerged in the rainforest.

programme.title: Arkeo (EN)

programme.desc: Between 3000 and 1400 BC, the Minoan civilization flourished in Crete, a large island located in the Mediterranean Sea. The Minoans were the first great civilization of the Greek world.

programme.title: Wild Connection

programme.title: One Year In the Singapore Botanic Gardens
programme.desc: Filmed over the course of a year, this series takes you into the secret lives of hidden wildlife in the 16 hectares of forest in the Singapore Botanic Gardens.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Wild City
programme.desc: With the latest film-making technology, Sir David Attenborough uncovers the unseen natural treasures of Singapore and explores how the wildlife has adapted to the human world.

programme.title: Among the Great Apes With Michelle Yeoh
programme.desc: Join internationally renowned actress Michelle Yeoh - star of Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon, Memoirs of a Geisha and The Lady - on a touching journey back home to Malaysia for an intimate look at the orangutan.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Mark and Jaclyn make their annual trek to Tornado Alley and this time they are looking for more than severe thunderstorms and tornadoes. They also want answers as to whether Climate Change is causing changes to Tornado Alley.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Adventurer George Kourounis joins Mark and Jaclyn on a journey to Nepal. They witness the devastation caused by the deadly 2015 earthquake, see first-hand the reconstruction efforts, and are awed by the warmth and hospitality of the Nepalese people.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Three explorations into the wild water that makes up over 70% of our angry planet. First, George travels to Guadaloupe Island off the coast of Mexico to dive with 16 foot Great White Sharks. He then uses drysuit and kayak to retrace the explorations of Tom Woodward into a flooded Northern Ontario cave in the middle of winter, then jetboats into the worlds biggest Class VI whitewater rapids in the Niagara River.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the worlds worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet 231 miles per hour was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a human popsicle, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Councils high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Dominica, the most volcanic and mountainous island in the Caribbean, is home to the Boiling Lake, a large waterfall-fed lake of furiously boiling water. Adventurer George Kourounis becomes the first person ever to traverse across the lake on a rope, risking his life to take water samples and shoot video from a place no human has ever been. He then dives to the ocean floor off the coast of the island to explore vents where the superheated water bubbles into the ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: One of the most exciting episodes of season one is Wild Water our look at Great White Sharks, water-filled caves and high voltage marine action.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: We hope Season Two will give us the opportunity to make the quintessential Angry Planet show a full episode exploring a major hurricane that makes landfall in Florida or the Carolinas.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Miners in Chihauhau, Mexico, has just discovered an amazing sight. Deep in the earth, only 300 feet from a pocket of molten magma, is an amazing chamber filled with giant blue and pink crystals some as big as 60 feet long! It is an extraordinary find and one that is very difficult to witness, as temperatures run to 150 F, with 100% humidity. The Mexican authorities are only opening up the cavern to scientists and film crews Angry Planet plans to be one of the first in!

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: We have filmed extensively in Hawaii, filming big-wave surfing at the famous Banzai Pipeline on Oahus North Shore, and filming George surfing with the Hawaian Fire firefighters. We have also filmed at the Hawaii Tsunami Institute and in Hilo, site of major Tsunami damage in both 1946 and 1964. We also have filmed extensively at Kilawea Volcano, filming the amazing sight of rivers and waterfalls of red hot lava flowing into the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Definitely our wildest episode so far. Heres the deal: Mt.Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Heres the first kicker:High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave a cave created by the most unique form of erosion Elephant Erosion. For millennia elephants have been going into the cave to carve it out with thir tusks in order to eat the salty rock.Heres the second kicker: the cave is thought to be the home of the Ebola Marberg virus the worlds most deadly virus.So heres the plan: We are going enter the cave, at night, wearing full Bio-Hazard suits to protect us from the virus.

programme.title: Mission: Hurricane
programme.desc: In 2013, Josh Morgerman chased Super Typhoon Haiyan to the Phillipines with the intention of being a mere spectator, but soon found himself rescuing locals from its dangerous aftermath

programme.title: Mission: Hurricane
programme.desc: Josh relives his most harrowing moments hunting the worlds most dangerous storms.

programme.title: Mission: Hurricane
programme.desc: In this episode, we recount some of Josh Morgerman's greatest chases throughout the country of Mexico, which over the years became his favorite storm hunting grounds.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Emily Calandrelli meets with Scott Kelly, the astronaut twin who spent nearly a year in space. She also visits the LIGO Observatory in Louisiana, which has revolutionized the way we study the universe.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Fact or Fiction?
programme.desc: John McLain (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building. The only way to save himself is to shoot through the glass window and break through to safety.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Fact or Fiction?
programme.desc: John Rambo's ability to decimate enemies all by himself has created some of the most incredible weapon stunts in Hollywood history. We test the reality surrounding these iconic scenes from this blockbuster franchise.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Fact or Fiction?
programme.desc: Can you really fire a GE Minigun handheld with ammunition held in a backpack (also seen on Captain America: Winter Soldier). Additionally, for one of our larger tests – can you actually chop down a jungle forest with a minigun?

programme.title: The Aviators
programme.sub-title: Day in the life of an air show (Part 1)
programme.desc: We take you behind the scenes for an exclusive look at the inner workings of one of America's biggest air shows.

programme.title: The Aviators
programme.sub-title: Day in the life of an air show (Part 2 )
programme.desc: The exciting conclusion to the two-part special including an up-close look at the U.S. Navy Blue Angels.

programme.title: The Aviators
programme.desc: The annual event of the Aircraft Owners and Pilots Association. We take you inside the aerial unit of the Los Angeles Police Department to see how the world's largest police fleet helps to catch bad guys and Jeff talks to Red Bull Air Racer Pete McLeod, about life as a high-adrenalin, competitive flyer.

programme.title: Battle Factory
programme.sub-title: A Pistol, a Firetruck, a Ghillie Suit, and an Armored Fighting Vehicle
programme.desc: At the Cabot factory in Pennsylvania, USA, a block of steel will be transformed by innovation and artistry into the ultimate update of an American classic. The 1911 did tours of duty in both world wars and Vietnam, and is still prized today by collectors and enthusiasts.

programme.title: Battle Factory
programme.sub-title: A Cannon, a Parachute, a Medal, and a Stretcher
programme.desc: A battle tank is only as effective as its gun, and for the Stryker vehicle, that's the M68 105mm cannon. A tube of forged steel will be hammered into the one of the most powerful and famous cannons in modern warfare.

programme.title: Battle Factory
programme.sub-title: A Grenade Launcher, a Flight Simulator, and Ration Packs
programme.desc: The M203 Grenade Launcher is a single shot launcher designed to attach under a rifle barrel. Using the latest technology, bits of plastic and a block of aluminum will be melted, molded, and cut to create a snap-on weapon that increases the firepower in a soldier's hands by a long shot.

programme.title: Secrets of the Brain
programme.desc: Dr Jack Lewis also meets an incredible man who woke from a coma to his brain producing a string of lies, he was confabulating.

programme.title: Secrets of the Brain
programme.desc: Dr Jack meets extreme risk taker Matthew Adams. Will tests at the University of Cambridge show that Matthew has a different brain from non-risk taking Jack?

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: Birds have colonised every inch of our planet from the hottest jungles to the barren ice shelves of Antarctica. Coming in all shapes and sizes each having adapted to their environment with unique lifestyles.

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: Caniforms can be found in various habitats across the world. Divided into 9 families including all bears, wolves and foxes, their size and lifestyles vary considerably.

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: Ancient as the dinosaurs themselves take a look at the family structure of crocodilians, turtles and snakes.

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: The great cats are a group of apex predators that rest firmly at the top of the food chain. Lions, leopards and tigers all live uniquely with particular hunting prowess, advantages and pack hierarchy or solitary territories.

programme.title: Monkey Thieves

programme.title: Monkey Thieves

programme.title: Monkey Thieves
programme.desc: Zamir and his new troop raid a jewelry store and break into a hotel store room leading to a run-in with little Kavi, who becomes the troop's latest recruit.

programme.title: Monkey Thieves

programme.desc: Esha gets lost and Kavi finds his way back to the Galta gang at last. Zamir's army attacks the Temple and Tarak is seriously injured in the battle.

programme.title: Monkey Thieves
programme.desc: Tarak is found dead and Kamal faces the prospect of leading the Galta Gang. Zamir attack's the temple again but is finally caught by the monkey catcher. New babies are born into the Galta Gang, but Zamir has also left a legacy in the city - twins!

programme.title: City Zoo
programme.desc: In this episode we meet some of the zoo's little mammals. The serval is due for his annual health check. The crew saved a porcupine from a very sticky situation. And the meerkats are given a chance to play with their food.

programme.title: Ant Anstead Master Mechanic
programme.desc: With the deadline looming on his Alfa 158 build, Ant has yet to even start the engine, let alone give the car a test drive Ant needs to finalize the look of his creation, so he seeks out legendary designer Chip Foose.

programme.title: Ant Anstead Master Mechanic
programme.desc: Ant has to strip the Alfa 158 down, paint every part and rebuild the car in time for its debut at the U.S. Grand Prix, then he puts the car through its paces on the track to see if performance lives up to expectations.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: The girls team up with IndyCar driver Ryan Hunter-Reay to design and build a new F150 that will be auctioned off to benefit the Cancer Research Foundation.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: The three-wheeled episode of "All Girls Garage" a Polaris Slingshot and a Vanderhall to play with both vehicles have car engines but are registered as motorcycles because of the three wheels.

programme.title: Downey's Dream Cars: Long Strange Trip
programme.desc: Setting his eyes on a used car that he has always wanted, Robert decides to flex his negotiating skills to achieve his goal.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Loud and Nasty
programme.desc: An old-time motorhead tasks Chad with building an open-wheel race car on a budget, Chad decides to start with an antique engine and build the car around it, but getting the engine running is a tricky task that may require a miracle to achieve.

programme.title: Spoolin' Up With the DeBertis: Beast Heading East
programme.desc: The guys take on one last challenge before making the move to North Carolina, building a truck that can haul their other trucks cross-country they enlist the help of professionals to teach Brad how to properly drift his car.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: Bogi finds an M-3 BMW she wants to buy for herself the AGG Team will need to rebuild the brakes, bleed the clutch, install a new radiator and rework the front-end with new headlights.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Lou and Jared work their magic on both old and new Challengers.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Chuck Liddell brings in a Ford Lightning to get proven tough.

programme.title: Ant Anstead Master Mechanic
programme.desc: With the deadline looming on his Alfa 158 build, Ant has yet to even start the engine, let alone give the car a test drive Ant needs to finalize the look of his creation, so he seeks out legendary designer Chip Foose.

programme.title: Survive The Wild
programme.desc: A predator's strategies must be superior to its prey's if they are to win the right to feed and live another day in the unforgiving wild.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: Animals use communication to attract mates, warn off predators, defend territory, or trick their prey. And of course, it's the senses that play the key role - Sight, smell, taste, touch, and hearing - all are employed to send signals to others…in the hope actions speak louder than words. In this episode of Animal Super Senses, we find out more about the sensory powers used by animals to make messages loud and clear.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Ian Gordon has been called upon to handle the delicate matter of moving an adult ragged tooth shark from one aquarium to another.

programme.title: Animal Armory
programme.desc: From the jungle to the ocean, predators like tigers, crocodiles, and sharks use lethal tools—teeth and claws—to dominate their prey. Nature's arsenal is unmatched.

programme.title: Snake Master
programme.desc: Renowned herpetologist Nirut Chomngam takes viewers on a wild journey across the country in an unforgettable adventure filled with deadly encounters, as he joins conservation teams tasked with protecting these astonishing creatures and their jungle home.

programme.title: Survive The Wild
programme.desc: From armored bodies, to feisty attitudes, to outright deception… there is only one rule to defense: do whatever it takes to survive the wild.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: In this last episode of animal Super Senses we take the grand final tour to see the greatest of all the special weapons that help some animals to govern the wilderness. In this episode we literally see it, hear it, touch it, smell it and taste it like animals do. Come and see the champions of the animal supremeness yourselves.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Because of its isolated habitat, little is known about the Galapagos Shark and its behaviors. And that's enough to get Shark Gordon interested, catching and tagging a group of the sharks to help…

programme.title: Animal Armory
programme.desc: From rams to lizards, many animals rely on direct body-to-body combat. This episode uncovers headbutts, wrestling, and full-on melees in the natural world.

programme.title: Inked by a Tattoo Needle!
programme.desc: Coyote faces manys fear... Getting a tatoo!Caring for a miniature pony is no small job! Coyote visits a farm and learns the basics of grooming, feeding, and why these tiny horses need special care.

programme.title: Camera Trap Catches Rare Animal!
programme.desc: Coyote sets up a hidden camera trap and captures never-before-seen animal behavior in the wild. The footage is stunning and unexpected.One of Mark's most anticipated stings—the warrior wasp! With a pain rating system in place, he breaks down exactly how intense it is.

programme.title: Top 13 Most Painful Insect Stings Coyote Peterson Has Ever Taken!
programme.desc: Coyote ranks the top 13 most painful insect stings he's ever taken. From bullet ants to wasps, it's a countdown filled with pain and science. From sand to sea, Coyote builds a mini mudflat aquarium packed with bizarre marine creatures. It's a deep dive into ocean ecology.

programme.title: SPIDER-MURDERING WASPS
programme.sub-title: 10 Things You Probably Need to Know!
programme.desc: Coyote dives into the world of parasitic wasps that hunt spiders. He shares ten incredible facts, blending science, storytelling, and edge-of-your-seat wildlife action.

programme.title: PREHISTORIC TREASURE FOUND?!
programme.desc: A surprising discovery leads Coyote on an adventure uncovering prehistoric relics. The episode mixes paleontology, exploration, and thrilling insights into ancient life.

programme.title: $10,000 Animal Challenge – Who Will Win?!
programme.desc: With a $10,000 prize on the line, Coyote and his crew take on a wild animal challenge to see who can find, catch, and identify the most species.Ten turtles in one day? Coyote takes on the shell-filled challenge with nets, patience, and muddy hands to see how many species he can spot.

programme.title: Bitten by 3 Attack Dogs!
programme.desc: In a dramatic training exercise, Coyote allows himself to be bitten by three trained attack dogs. Protective gear is tested to the limit.Ever wanted to catch fireflies and make a glow lantern? Coyote shows how to safely observe these luminous bugs and builds a bug-powered lantern.

programme.title: Will It Bite?! – Giant Bloodsucking Parasite!
programme.desc: A giant bloodsucking parasite—will it bite? Coyote takes the risk to learn how these creatures latch onto hosts and extract blood.

programme.title: Bitten by the Biggest Ant in the World!
programme.desc: The largest ant in the world? Mark puts its jaws to the test in an unforgettable, up-close bite challenge.Face-to-face with a killer hornet, Mark accepts another sting challenge to educate viewers about hornet defense and behavior.

programme.title: Big Angry Snake – Can It Be Rescued?
programme.desc: A huge, angry snake must be rescued. Coyote carefully relocates the serpent while explaining its importance to the ecosystem.Are baby snakes just as dangerous as adults? Coyote explains how venom works in hatchlings and why they're not to be underestimated.

programme.title: SAVED! Prehistoric Bird Escapes Extinction!
programme.desc: Discover how a prehistoric bird species was brought back from the brink of extinction. Coyote explains the science, challenges, and incredible success story of survival.

programme.title: Jellyfish Jolt! Coyote's Shocking Experiment!
programme.desc: A shocking episode—literally. Coyote tests the sting of a jellyfish and demonstrates just how much electricity nature can pack.In this serene underwater adventure, Mark swims with over 100 gentle manatees and shares why they're so crucial to marine ecosystems.

programme.title: Spitting Cobra vs. My Face!
programme.desc: Face to fangs—Coyote encounters a spitting cobra. He tests how accurate its venom aim is and how to respond to this rare defense tactic.Coyote participates in a controversial conservation procedure: trimming a rhino's horn. He explains the reasons, risks, and impact of the act.

programme.title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range
programme.desc: To celebrate the arrival of the new Bentayga EWB, an exclusive First Edition is now available. Subject to a limited production run for the first twelve months of orders, it combines many of the most desirable options available for the car with a package of eye-catching details found only on Bentley First Editions. First Edition badging can be seen to the exterior of the car – a theme that extends inside, with badging on the veneered fascia, as well as embroidery on the seats. Unique First Edition contrast stitching and embroidery adorns the seats and, depending on the choice of veneers, handcrafted metal overlays just 0.075 mm thick can be applied to the fascia and waistrails in the front and the rear door veneer. The First Edition offers elegant and timeless design, focusing on maximum comfort and well-being. This specifically tailored specification includes a unique 22” ten-spoke directional wheel and bright lower bumper grilles. Other additional features as standard include unique quilted seats, mood lighting, a heated steering wheel, and increased driver's assistance aids. Attention to detail is clear, from the badging that identifies the car to the jewelled caps on the fuel and oil fillers.

programme.title: The new Porsche 911 GT3 R
programme.desc: The turbocharged three-litre flat-six in the new 911 GTS delivers 353 kW (480 PS). Maximum torque is 570 Nm, an increase of 20 Nm over its predecessor. Zero to 100 km/h takes just 3.3 seconds (911 Carrera 4 GTS: Fuel consumption combined (NEDC) 10.5 – 9.7 l/100 km, Fuel consumption combined (WLTP) 11.4 – 10.6 l/100 km, CO₂ emissions combined (NEDC) 240 – 222 g/km, CO₂ emissions combined (WLTP) 259 – 240 g/km) in the 911 Carrera 4 GTS Coupé with the eight-speed Porsche dual-clutch transmission (PDK): three tenths faster than its predecessor. A seven-speed manual transmission with a particularly short throw is available for all 911 GTS models as an alternative to the PDK.

programme.title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID. Buzz
programme.sub-title: How was the electric Microbus created
programme.desc: The new model line's assistance systems perfect ease of driving and safety. Included as standard in the ID. Buzz and ID. Buzz Cargo is the ‘Car2X' local warning system, which utilises signals from other vehicles and the transport infrastructure to spot hazards in real time. Also included as standard: the ‘Front Assist' emergency braking function and, in the MPV, the ‘Lane Assist' lane-keeping assistant. With new software, new assistance functions are also making their way into the ID. family. Available as an option is ‘Travel Assist with swarm data', which facilitates partially automated driving across the entire speed range and, for the first time, assisted lane-changing on the motorway. Also new: the ‘Memory Function' for automated parking on a previously saved route.

programme.title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Design Reveal Film
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic world-first climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute. A loss of traction risked plunging down the perilous 90m drop at the base of the spillway to the valley floor below. The successful spillway ascent was screened for the first time at an exclusive launch event at Jaguar Land Rover's Advanced Product Creation Centre at Gaydon, UK. Official James Bond stunt driver Jessica Hawkins was behind the wheel as the New Range Rover Sport demonstrated its grip, traction, performance and composure, completing the latest in a series of challenges for Land Rover's luxury performance SUV. Previous feats include a record-setting hill-climb at Pikes Peak, a first recorded crossing of the ‘Empty Quarter' desert in the Arabian Peninsula and a first ascent of the 999 steps to Heaven's Gate in China, in 2018.

programme.title: Hispano Suiza showcases its history in the Peralada Castle Museum
programme.desc: The history of Hispano Suiza is showcased, for the very first time, in the Peralada Castle Museum (Girona, Spain) where visitors will be able to contemplate the past and present of the legendary car brand founded in 1904 by Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt. The Hispano Suiza Room will close the usual tour of the Peralada Castle Museum. After years of researching to gather the largest number of pieces and objects related to its history, Hispano Suiza becomes part of this important collection. The Hispano Suiza exhibition encompasses a journey through various decades: from the beginning of the 20th century, when Hispano Suiza was founded, to the present day. After passing through a luxurious hall, the public will be able to visit a recreation of the offices of Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt, where countless business and technical ideas, emerged and took shape, turning Hispano Suiza into a point of reference, for luxury, comfort and technical solutions. In this area, the original painting 'Dame with a mink' by Ramon Casas takes pride of place: it was used as an illustration on the company's original shares.

programme.title: Digital Matrix LED and digital OLED technology in the new Audi A8 L Animation
programme.desc: Digital Matrix LED and digital OLED technology in the new Audi A8 L Animation

programme.title: TechDay Digital Light
programme.desc: Safety and customer satisfaction come first at Audi. They are part and parcel of the success of the company with the four rings. In that context, light technology is steadily growing more important and creating a wider range of possibilities and perspectives, from added safety for the driver, to external communication and individualization. Systematic light digitization is making all of this possible. It is particularly visible in the new Audi A8: the forward-looking Digital Matrix LED headlights and digital OLED rear lights raise the customer experience to a whole new level: for the first time in any Audi model, light is completely digitized. The car can be individualized even further through its digital OLED rear lights. The Digital Matrix LED headlights also include three new functions: advanced traffic information, a lane light with direction indicator lights on highways, and an orientation light on country roads. These features not only demonstrate Audi's “Vorsprung durch Technik,” they also add value.

programme.title: 2022 Peugeot 308
programme.desc: The sixth generation Opel/Vauxhall Astra and third generation Peugeot 308 are both based on the Stellantis EMP2 platform and, unsurprisingly, score very similarly across all four areas of assessment. Both the offset test and the full-width crash test highlighted marginal chest injury protection for average male and small female drivers, and neither car was equipped with a centre airbag for far-side crash protection, a countermeasure which is increasingly common on modern cars. Both cars offer plenty of crash avoidance technology but do not include some of the latest advancements introduced in the market. The cars' four-star ratings apply also to their PHEV variants.

programme.title: 2022 Volvo C40 Recharge
programme.desc: The fully electric Volvo C40 Recharge has been awarded a five-star safety rating in the 2022 Euro NCAP tests, joining its siblings in the Volvo Cars line-up as one of the safest cars on the road today. The rating continues Volvo Cars' five-star streak in Euro NCAP testing, as all tested Volvo models on sale today received five stars in their respective Euro NCAP assessments. The C40 Recharge scored especially well on occupant safety and driver assist systems, helped by one of the most extensive standard safety offers in its segment. Among many other scenarios, these safety technologies help drivers detect and avoid collisions, remain in their lane and reduce the impact of accidentally running off the road.

programme.title: One Perfect Day in Kentucky
programme.desc: In "One Perfect Day in Kentucky," BFF's Kimberly and Elsa bring their shared competitive streak to the Bluegrass State, facing off to find out who can plan the perfect Kentucky day. Each is determined to delight - and outdo - the other with unforgettable experiences that showcase the state's rich culture. Elsa kicks off the competition with a classic Kentucky breakfast, a recipe she learned from top Chef Ouita Michel at her Holly Hill Cooking Studio. Elsa wins the first point, but Kimberly's ready to up the ante, whisking Elsa away for a thrilling cave kayaking adventure at the Gorge Underground. As they ride the chairlift to the top of the stunning Natural Bridge, the rivalry kicks into high gear and they go head-to-head in a trivia battle. The next surprise – a toast with Kentucky's own Ale-8 soda , sourced by Kimberly straight from the factory only whets their whistles. At the Keeneland Racetrack they sip some spirit forward Keeneland Breezes while Elsa reveals all she has learned about racehorses from a visit to renowned trainer Mark Simms Jr. ‘s horse barn. A Betologist gives them a quick lesson on wagering and Kimberly's horse wins the race. At Louisville's Trouble Bar, Kimberly shares her newfound knowledge of Kentucky bourbon production from a tour and tasting at Castle + Key distillery and makes Elsa One Perfect Drink.
